confusables: affect 是動詞「影響」，effect 是名詞「效果」
personal 形容詞「個人的」，personnel 名詞「全體人員」
principal 是人或形容詞，principle 是抽象概念
accept 動詞「接受」，except 介詞「除了」
advise 動詞，advice 名詞（不可數）
assure 對人保證，ensure 確保事情發生
beside 空間位置，besides 表追加
stationary 不動的，stationery 紙筆文具
precede 時間先後，proceed 往前走
council 組織，counsel 建議或律師
eligible 符合條件，illegible 字跡潦草
economic 關於經濟，economical 省錢的
respectful 態度恭敬，respective 分別的
rise 自己升，raise 把東西抬高
lay 需受詞，lie 不需受詞
borrow 從別人那裡借，lend 借給別人
aboard 交通工具上，abroad 海外
access 進入/取得，assess 評價
adapt 調整適應，adopt 正式採納
collocations: I'd like to make a reservation for two.
Please submit a proposal by end of day.
The team worked overtime to meet the deadline.
We need to place an order for more supplies.
HR will conduct a survey on employee satisfaction.
The customer filed a complaint about the service.
The tenant decided to renew the contract for another year.
The store will issue a refund within 5 business days.
Please schedule an appointment with the doctor.
After hours of discussion, they reached a compromise.
Sales this quarter exceeded expectations by 20%.
The lawyer will review the document before signing.
The board approved the budget for next fiscal year.
The company will implement the new policy in January.
All products must comply with safety regulations.
She successfully negotiated a deal with the supplier.
The company launched a marketing campaign last week.
The mediator helped resolve the dispute between parties.
The manager will allocate resources to priority projects.
It takes 3 weeks to process an application.
Please notify us in advance if you cannot attend.
The company will reimburse travel expenses.
You can extend the warranty for an additional fee.
The meeting was postponed due to the storm.
